data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. While the linked use case describes a scenario where itinerary updates occur, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the real-time updates are operational. This leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time itinerary updates functionality being validated through API reads or persisted state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
